ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., Theory, Practical) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  "prerequisite" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course (if any) */,
  "corequisite" INTEGER /* ID of the corequisite course (if any) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor in charge of the course */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_corequisite FOREIGN KEY ("corequisite") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisite FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" TEXT /* Year of enrollment */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Cumulative Grade Point Average of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student is enrolled */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the student is enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Withdrawn, Completed) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the course (if completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of the assessment (e.g., Internal, External, Back Paper) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the final grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the assessment must be completed */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum possible score for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrollment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained by the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade (e.g., A, A+, B) */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date when the grade was awarded */,
  "retake" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is a retake grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "back_papers" (
  "back_paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each back paper */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student retaking the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "retake_date" TEXT /* Date of the retake */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained in the retake */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade in the retake */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the back paper (e.g., Failed, Absent) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the back paper (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("back_paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_back_papers_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_back_papers_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., professor, teaching assistant, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
